meta.title: Porta Nova Loft Guide
meta.description: Operations-first guest guide preset for remote work stays and autonomous self check-in rentals.

headline.en: A workstay guide built for self check-ins, smart autonomy and minimal guest friction.
headline.it: A workstay guide built for self check-ins, smart autonomy and minimal guest friction.
headline.fr: A workstay guide built for self check-ins, smart autonomy and minimal guest friction.

subtitle.en: Quick access first: Wi-Fi, check-in, workspace, support and house systems without decorative detours.
subtitle.it: Quick access first: Wi-Fi, check-in, workspace, support and house systems without decorative detours.
subtitle.fr: Quick access first: Wi-Fi, check-in, workspace, support and house systems without decorative detours.

welcome.en: Use this preset if your listing tone is modern, practical and slightly premium. It suits serviced apartments, city lofts and remote-work-friendly stays.
welcome.it: Usa questo preset se il tono della tua struttura e moderno, pratico e leggermente premium. Perfetto per serviced apartments, loft cittadini e stay adatti al remote work.
welcome.fr: Utilisez ce preset si le ton de votre logement est moderne, pratique et legerement premium. Ideal pour serviced apartments, lofts urbains et sejours remote work.

footerNote.en: Ideal for serviced apartments, urban rentals and remote-work guests.
footerNote.it: Ideale per serviced apartment, affitti urbani e ospiti in remote work.
footerNote.fr: Ideal pour serviced apartments, locations urbaines et voyageurs remote work.

intro.en: If plans change or you need a fast answer during the stay, use these direct contacts.
intro.it: Se i piani cambiano o ti serve una risposta veloce durante il soggiorno, usa questi contatti diretti.
intro.fr: Si vos plans changent ou si vous avez besoin d'une reponse rapide pendant le sejour, utilisez ces contacts directs.

copy.en: This template is intentionally utility-heavy. Guests should be able to solve access, workspace and support questions in seconds.
copy.it: This template is intentionally utility-heavy. Guests should be able to solve access, workspace and support questions in seconds.
copy.fr: This template is intentionally utility-heavy. Guests should be able to solve access, workspace and support questions in seconds.

copy.en: Focus on speed: metro, groceries, pharmacy and one or two strong dining options.
copy.it: Concentrati sulla velocita: metro, spesa, farmacia e una o due ottime opzioni food.
copy.fr: Concentrez-vous sur la rapidite : metro, courses, pharmacie et une ou deux bonnes adresses food.

title.en: Quick access, low friction, smart autonomy.
title.it: Quick access, low friction, smart autonomy.
title.fr: Quick access, low friction, smart autonomy.

body.en: The gallery theme shifts the template toward a cleaner metropolitan tone. It is useful when the property promise is efficiency, location and smart autonomy rather than leisurely escape.
body.it: Il tema gallery sposta il template verso un tono metropolitano piu pulito. E utile quando la promessa della struttura e efficienza, posizione e autonomia intelligente piu che evasione rilassata.
body.fr: Le theme gallery oriente le template vers un ton metropolitain plus net. Il convient quand la promesse du logement repose sur l'efficacite, l'emplacement et l'autonomie.

en: Replace the self check-in copy with your exact entry sequence.
Mention one backup contact for late train or flight arrivals.
Keep the city recommendations limited to what a short stay can actually use.
it: Sostituisci il testo self check-in con la tua sequenza di ingresso esatta.
Indica un contatto di backup per arrivi in ritardo da treno o volo.
Limita i consigli in citta a cio che un soggiorno breve puo davvero usare.
fr: Remplacez le texte self check-in par votre sequence d'entree exacte.
Ajoutez un contact de secours pour les arrivees tardives en train ou avion.
Limitez les recommandations a ce qu'un court sejour peut vraiment utiliser.

copy.en: Use the support cards for operations, maintenance or concierge assistance.
copy.it: Usa queste card per operations, manutenzione o concierge.
copy.fr: Utilisez ces cartes pour operations, maintenance ou concierge.

description.en: Give guests a quick way to connect without searching in messages.
description.it: Dai agli ospiti un modo rapido per connettersi senza cercare nei messaggi.
description.fr: Donnez aux voyageurs un acces rapide au Wi-Fi sans fouiller dans les messages.

title.it: Condividi i dettagli rete con stile
title.fr: Partagez les details reseau avec style

copy.en: Use the built-in buttons for one-tap copying and direct connection on supported devices.
copy.it: Usa i pulsanti inclusi per copiare in un tap e collegarti direttamente sui dispositivi supportati.
copy.fr: Utilisez les boutons integres pour copier en un tap et se connecter directement sur les appareils compatibles.

description.en: Door code, building access and after-hours notes live here.
description.it: Door code, building access and after-hours notes live here.
description.fr: Door code, building access and after-hours notes live here.

title.en: Give guests the shortest path from street to door
title.it: Give guests the shortest path from street to door
title.fr: Give guests the shortest path from street to door

copy.en: Use this card for keypad flow, building access, elevator notes and backup contact rules.
copy.it: Use this card for keypad flow, building access, elevator notes and backup contact rules.
copy.fr: Use this card for keypad flow, building access, elevator notes and backup contact rules.

text.en: Standard arrival from 15:00. Message the host for luggage drop or late check-in support.
text.it: Arrivo standard dalle 15:00. Scrivi all'host per deposito bagagli o supporto late check-in.
text.fr: Arrivee standard a partir de 15h00. Ecrivez a l'host pour depot bagages ou arrivee tardive.

text.en: The walk takes around 18 minutes. Use this route to avoid the busiest vehicle-only streets.
text.it: La camminata dura circa 18 minuti. Usa questo percorso per evitare le strade piu trafficate.
text.fr: La marche prend environ 18 minutes. Utilisez cet itineraire pour eviter les rues les plus chargees.

description.en: Desk, calls, sockets and backup work options in one place.
description.it: Desk, calls, sockets and backup work options in one place.
description.fr: Desk, calls, sockets and backup work options in one place.

title.en: Treat the workspace like a real feature
title.it: Treat the workspace like a real feature
title.fr: Treat the workspace like a real feature

copy.en: If the stay is work-friendly, tell guests exactly how the setup behaves during a full day of use.
copy.it: If the stay is work-friendly, tell guests exactly how the setup behaves during a full day of use.
copy.fr: If the stay is work-friendly, tell guests exactly how the setup behaves during a full day of use.

text.en: Explain where the main desk sits, how natural light changes during the day and where sockets are easiest to reach.
text.it: Explain where the main desk sits, how natural light changes during the day and where sockets are easiest to reach.
text.fr: Explain where the main desk sits, how natural light changes during the day and where sockets are easiest to reach.

text.en: Mention the best corner for calls and any time windows that are extra quiet for meetings.
text.it: Mention the best corner for calls and any time windows that are extra quiet for meetings.
text.fr: Mention the best corner for calls and any time windows that are extra quiet for meetings.

text.en: Recommend one reliable cafe or coworking option for a guest who wants a second workspace nearby.
text.it: Recommend one reliable cafe or coworking option for a guest who wants a second workspace nearby.
text.fr: Recommend one reliable cafe or coworking option for a guest who wants a second workspace nearby.

description.en: Hot water, building access, switches or smart devices that guests should understand fast.
description.it: Hot water, building access, switches or smart devices that guests should understand fast.
description.fr: Hot water, building access, switches or smart devices that guests should understand fast.

title.en: Explain the apartment like a product
title.it: Explain the apartment like a product
title.fr: Explain the apartment like a product

copy.en: This is the right place for things that are easy once explained but frustrating when hidden.
copy.it: This is the right place for things that are easy once explained but frustrating when hidden.
copy.fr: This is the right place for things that are easy once explained but frustrating when hidden.

text.en: State whether hot water is instant, how long it takes to recover and where guests adjust the temperature.
text.it: State whether hot water is instant, how long it takes to recover and where guests adjust the temperature.
text.fr: State whether hot water is instant, how long it takes to recover and where guests adjust the temperature.

text.en: Clarify intercom, smart lock, common building door or mailbox instructions if they matter after check-in.
text.it: Clarify intercom, smart lock, common building door or mailbox instructions if they matter after check-in.
text.fr: Clarify intercom, smart lock, common building door or mailbox instructions if they matter after check-in.

text.en: Give one fast reset or contact path for issues with power, router or smart devices.
text.it: Give one fast reset or contact path for issues with power, router or smart devices.
text.fr: Give one fast reset or contact path for issues with power, router or smart devices.

description.en: Everything you need to know before leaving.
description.it: Tutto quello che devi sapere prima di partire.
description.fr: Tout ce que vous devez savoir avant de partir.

copy.en: No need to clean, just a few quick checks before closing the door.
copy.it: Non serve pulire, solo un rapido controllo prima di chiudere la porta.
copy.fr: Pas besoin de nettoyer, juste quelques vérifications avant de fermer la porte.

text.en: Standard checkout is at 10:30. Let us know if you need to store luggage.
text.it: Il checkout standard è alle 10:30. Facci sapere se hai bisogno di depositare i bagagli.
text.fr: Le départ standard est à 10h30. Dites-nous si vous devez laisser des bagages.

text.en: Leave the keys on the console table, turn off the lights and ensure the door is locked behind you.
text.it: Lascia le chiavi sul mobile all'ingresso, spegni le luci e assicurati che la porta sia chiusa.
text.fr: Laissez les clés sur la console, éteignez les lumières et assurez-vous que la porte est fermée.

description.it: Numeri importanti e informazioni sulla sicurezza.
description.fr: Numéros importants et informations de sécurité.

copy.en: In case of immediate danger, always call the national emergency number first.
copy.it: In caso di pericolo immediato, chiama sempre prima il numero di emergenza nazionale.
copy.fr: En cas de danger immédiat, appelez toujours d'abord le numéro d'urgence national.

text.en: Call 112 for police, ambulance or fire department.
text.it: Chiama 112 per polizia, ambulanza o vigili del fuoco.
text.fr: Appelez le 112 pour la police, l'ambulance ou les pompiers.
Situé dans le placard de la salle de bain.

description.en: Help guests decide when to walk, when to take a taxi and what is realistic from the property.
description.it: Aiuta gli ospiti a capire quando camminare, quando prendere un taxi e cosa e realistico dall'alloggio.
description.fr: Aidez les voyageurs a savoir quand marcher, quand prendre un taxi et ce qui est realiste depuis le logement.

title.en: Answer the transport questions before they ask
title.it: Rispondi prima alle domande sui trasporti
title.fr: Repondez aux questions transport avant qu'elles n'arrivent

copy.en: State the easiest route from key arrival points and recommend one taxi app or number if relevant.
copy.it: Indica il percorso piu facile dai principali punti di arrivo e suggerisci una app taxi o un numero se utile.
copy.fr: Indiquez le trajet le plus simple depuis les principaux points d'arrivee et recommandez une appli taxi ou un numero si utile.

text.en: Most landmarks are reachable on foot from the apartment. Mention this because it changes how guests plan their days.
text.it: La maggior parte dei luoghi principali e raggiungibile a piedi dall'appartamento. Dillo, perche cambia il modo in cui gli ospiti organizzano la giornata.
text.fr: La plupart des sites sont accessibles a pied depuis l'appartement. Dites-le, car cela change la facon dont les voyageurs organisent leurs journees.

text.en: Use a saved walking route for arrivals with luggage and avoid vague written directions.
text.it: Usa un percorso salvato per gli arrivi con bagagli ed evita indicazioni scritte vaghe.
text.fr: Utilisez un itineraire sauvegarde pour les arrivees avec bagages et evitez les indications vagues.

description.en: Direct guests to the right channel before they escalate a simple issue.
description.it: Direct guests to the right channel before they escalate a simple issue.
description.fr: Direct guests to the right channel before they escalate a simple issue.

title.en: Tell guests who to contact for what
title.it: Tell guests who to contact for what
title.fr: Tell guests who to contact for what

copy.en: Differentiate urgent safety issues from access questions and normal host support.
copy.it: Differentiate urgent safety issues from access questions and normal host support.
copy.fr: Differentiate urgent safety issues from access questions and normal host support.

text.en: Keep the emergency number first for safety issues or immediate danger.
text.it: Keep the emergency number first for safety issues or immediate danger.
text.fr: Keep the emergency number first for safety issues or immediate danger.

text.en: Clarify the fastest route for access or apartment questions: WhatsApp, phone or message app.
text.it: Clarify the fastest route for access or apartment questions: WhatsApp, phone or message app.
text.fr: Clarify the fastest route for access or apartment questions: WhatsApp, phone or message app.

text.en: If you use a co-host or local contact, say when guests should reach them instead of the main host.
text.it: If you use a co-host or local contact, say when guests should reach them instead of the main host.
text.fr: If you use a co-host or local contact, say when guests should reach them instead of the main host.

subtitle.en: Wi-Fi, arrival details, local recommendations and host contacts
subtitle.it: Wi-Fi, arrivo, consigli locali e contatti host
subtitle.fr: Wi-Fi, arrivee, recommandations locales et contacts host

tagline.en: Scan for Wi-Fi, arrival info & local tips
tagline.it: Scansiona per Wi-Fi, arrivo e consigli locali
tagline.fr: Scannez pour Wi-Fi, arrivee et conseils locaux

audience.en: Remote workers, self check-in rentals and autonomous guests
audience.it: Remote workers, self check-in rentals and autonomous guests
audience.fr: Remote workers, self check-in rentals and autonomous guests

wizardDefaults.bestFor: Hosts who want check-in, workspace and support visible before anything else.
